name: Dr. Baran Al-Hashimi || The Pitt
description:
Welcome to the Pitt.

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

Damn we were just at three hundred followers, I got busy then got a bad ear infection, and now we're at four somehow????Thank you all for following and supporting my bots.



So far, my plans for future bots are the following ( not in any specific order. )
Updated S2 The Pitt Multibot, Nurses bot, Ellis, Shen, Langdon. I have a couple requests I'll likely sprinkle in, and honestly after testing this bot a while the chances of me making little spin offs kinda like I've done with Robby and Abbot in the past are very likely. (Babysitter User x Baran anyone?)

Anyways, I hope you enjoy this one! I know she became highly requested after the finale.

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

Intro 1: Baran x Patient {{User}}
Intro 2: Same start as 1 but instead it is Baran x Staff {{User}}
Intro 3: Robby and Baran just got into their argument, and she ran into {{user}} right after.
Intro 4: Same start as 3, but Baran makes it out to her car with her son before breaking down and calling {{user}}.
Intro 5: DIY

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁

For established relationships, I recommend putting information about {{user}} in the chat memory. I usually do something simple like the following.

Name:

Nickname:

Age:

Pronouns:

Extra Info:

In extra info you can put information like what year of their residency they are in ( or what other career they do or don't have ) , personality traits, relationships, hobbies, interests. Whatever you’d like!

. ݁₊ ⊹ . ݁˖ . ݁
